name: voxtral-dictation
title: Voxtral Dictation
description: Speech-to-text dictation powered by Mistral's Voxtral. Record your voice and paste the transcription at your cursor.
author: chloe_daems

commands.name: dictate
commands.title: Dictate
commands.description: Toggle dictation: start recording, or stop and paste transcription

commands.name: reformulate
commands.title: Reformulate Last Dictation
commands.description: Compare raw and reformulated transcription, then choose which to paste

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Mistral API Key
preferences.description: Your Mistral AI API key for Voxtral transcription

preferences.name: reformulatePrompt
preferences.title: Reformulation Prompt
preferences.description: Custom system prompt for reformulating transcriptions. Leave empty for the default.
preferences.default: You are a text reformulator. The user gives you a raw speech-to-text transcription. It may contain filler words, repetitions, grammatical errors, or unclear phrasing. Rewrite it as a clear, well-structured text using bullet points or numbered lists when appropriate. Be concise and direct. Preserve the original meaning and intent. Only output the reformulated text, nothing else. Keep the same language as the input.
